title: 皐月賞の後に・キラキラなんばーわん

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeeeah!
Go, Smart Falcon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I got... first place?

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon! Center stage is yours!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It sure is! I'm taking center stage!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon!
Falcooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So this is the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: This is what it feels like to be a top Umadol!

Smart Falcon sings and dances from center stage
to the roaring delight of a packed venue. She
shines even more brilliantly than usual.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: D-did... did my song reach your heart?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was cheering so loud, I couldn't hear
anything at all after a while...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It did? It did?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Then, that means... it must have reached
everyone...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That was sooo much fun!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! You know, the top stage is
something else!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All the lights in the crowd were way brighter than
the spotlights! The whole world in front of my
eyes was shining!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just felt so... connected to everyone! Like we
were all feeling the same emotions!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Do you get what I mean? Does that make sense
to you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I want to experience the same thing in a
dirt race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to sing on the brightest, shiniest stage in
the whole wide world!

Smart Falcon is dead serious all of a sudden.
Having gotten a taste of what it's like at the top,
she's more determined than ever to make her
dream a reality.

Not only that, but I feel exactly the same after
seeing her sing and dance on the biggest stage
out there!
choice_data_list: Let's recreate today's concert in dirt racing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Let's make it happen!

We go back to the waiting room and, looking a
little calmer than before, Smart Falcon makes a
suggestion for her next steps.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna run in a G1 dirt race next!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My rookie days are over. It's time to take my next
step as an Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And that step... is to get up on a stage that'll
make me known all over the country.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I wanna run more G1 races like the Satsuki Sho!

It's clear that she now has what it takes to
compete against the powerful runners the G1
races attract. In which case...
choice_data_list: How about the Japan Dirt Derby?

text_block_list.text:
It's a race reserved only for classic-year racers,
just like the Satsuki Sho, and one I'd love to see
her win.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good to me! Really, I'm good with
anything as long as it's a G1!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's not a lot of G1 dirt races out there... So
I've gotta get on every stage I can!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Next stop, the Japan Dirt Derby and the top of
the dirt world! ☆

Our next goal is decided. Japan Dirt Derby, here
we come!
